Appearances:
Plaintiff Housing Development and Neighborhood Preservation is present. Represented by, Cheley Quiambao.
Attorney, Brenda Cruz Keith is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Hugo Alvarado is present and appearing with Full Scope Attorney, Joshua Cruz.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of September 24, 2012 remains on calendar.
